processors.name: Stripe
processors.purpose: Card payments, connected accounts, payment status, platform fees, and billing reconciliation.
processors.notes: Trennen does not store full card numbers on its servers.

processors.name: Transactional email provider
processors.purpose: Account, password reset, order, support, bounce, complaint, and delivery-status emails.
processors.notes: Production may use Resend or SMTP depending on environment configuration.

processors.name: AWS Lightsail and server storage
processors.purpose: Application hosting, SQLite database storage, local uploads, logs, and operational backups.
processors.notes: Production deployment should confirm hosting region and backup retention.

processors.name: Shopify
processors.purpose: Optional store integration for quote sessions and draft order handoff if enabled.
processors.notes: Lean production release currently disables public Shopify routes.

processors.name: Shipping providers
processors.purpose: Shipping quotes, fulfilment, and delivery tracking if enabled by a store.
processors.notes: Current public checkout uses store-configured shipping options.
